zh.lifeSummary: 當Nancy Burris於1790年9月21日出生在美國南卡羅來納州安德森安德森時，她的父親Joshua Burris35歲，母親Sarah Mary Chamblee36歲。她於1802年與Silas Massey結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1875年6月21日在美國南卡羅來納州安德森莫泰 可可 邱奇享年84歲，埋葬在美國南卡羅來納州安德森莫泰 可可 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Burris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Burrows  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrows
meanings: (mainly Sheffield): occasionally also a topographic name or occupational name for someone who lived or worked at a house with a chamber for conducting manorial business (Middle English bour, Old English būr ‘bower, chamber’, + hous ‘house’). Compare Burroughs and Burris .

variants.name: Burres
meanings: English: variant of   Burris   and   Burress   (see   Burrows  ).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burriss
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burress
meanings: English (Middlesex and Essex): variant of   Burris   (see   Burrows  ). This surname is now rare in Britain.
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Nancy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nancie
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nanci
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

historicEvents.description: Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: Head Tax Law
historicEvents.description: "In 1792, South Carolina passes a law called the ""head tax"" for all free African Americans from age 16-50. This tax was $2.00."
historicEvents.urlTitle: JSTOR- The Journal of Negro History

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Slave Rebellion
historicEvents.description: "On June 16, 1822,  Denmark Vesey a free and self-educated African American leads a slave rebellion called ""the rising."" The interesting thing about this rebellion is that it does not really happen. The only thing the judges have to go on is the testimony of people that witness it."

historicEvents.title: Angry Mob Seizes U-S Mail
historicEvents.description: On August 31, 1835, in Charleston, South Carolina an angry mob takes control over the U-S mail and burns it in public.

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
In 1860, South Carolina quit the United States because its citizens were in favor of slavery and President Lincoln was not. The Civil War started a year later.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

en.lifeSummary: When Nancy Burris was born on 21 September 1790, in Anderson, Anderson, South Carolina, United States, her father, Joshua Burris, was 35 and her mother, Sarah Mary Chamblee, was 36. She married Silas Massey in 1802. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 21 June 1875, in Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 84, and was buried in Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, South Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nancy Burris est née le 21 septembre 1790, à Anderson, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, son père, Joshua Burris, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sarah Mary Chamblee, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Silas Massey en 1802. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 juin 1875, à Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nancy Burris è nata il il 21 settembre 1790 nel Anderson, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Joshua Burris, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Sarah Mary Chamblee, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Silas Massey nel 1802. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 21 giugno 1875, nel Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Nancy Burrisが1790年9月21日にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンアンダーソンで生まれた時，父Joshua Burrisは35歳，母Sarah Mary Chambleeは36歳であった。1802年にSilas Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1875年6月21日にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンモウンティイン クレエク チャーチで84歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンモウンティイン クレエク チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, South C: 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우테인 크리크 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Nancy Burris(이)가 1790년 9월 21일 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 앤더슨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joshua Burris(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Mary Chamblee(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1802년 Silas Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1875년 6월 21일 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우테인 크리크 c후르치에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우테인 크리크 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nancy Burris nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1790, em Anderson, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Joshua Burris, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Mary Chamblee, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Silas Massey em 1802. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de junho de 1875, em Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nancy Burris родилась 21 сентября 1790 г. в местности андирсон, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Joshua Burris было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Mary Chamblee, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Silas Massey в 1802 г. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 21 июня 1875 г. в местности маунтеин крик чурч, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности маунтеин крик чурч, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nancy Burris nació el 21 de septiembre de 1790, en Anderson, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, su papá, Joshua Burris, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sarah Mary Chamblee, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Silas Massey en 1802. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 21 de junio de 1875, en Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Mountain Creek Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos.
